demo.credsEmailed: Your widget password was emailed to you — check your inbox.
demo.failed: Could not start the demo. Please try again.
demo.bannerDesc: You're exploring a temporary demo workspace.
demo.snippetLabel: Drop this into your page to collect feedback:
demo.step1Hint: In your app's index.html, add this inside <head> (or just before </body>) — it loads the Pointer widget.
demo.step2Hint: Then add this inside <body>, where you want feedback enabled.
demo.step3Hint: Open a terminal, cd into your project root, and run this — it installs the AI skills and creates .pointer/credentials.env.
demo.step4Hint: Open the generated .pointer/credentials.env and paste your widget login (shown above).
demo.step5Hint: Open your app in the browser, click any element, and write a comment.
demo.step6Hint: Back in your AI tool (Claude Code, Cursor, …), ask this — it pulls the feedback and applies it to your code.
demo.upgradeIntro: Keep this demo workspace and all its comments — just set your email and a password.
demo.upgradeSuccess: Your workspace is now permanent. Welcome to Pointer!

login.title: Pointer Admin
login.notAdmin: This account is not an admin.

auth.forgotSent: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way.

auth.resetInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

projects.title: Projects
projects.name: Name
projects.deleteConfirm: Delete this project? This cannot be undone.
projects.deleteBlockedComments: This project has comments — only an admin can delete it.

exportImport.importHint: Upload a Pointer export file (.json). Comments are added to this project under your account.

predefined.tenantHelp: Reusable actions available in every project. Each has a label users pick and a prompt sent to the AI when applying the comment.
predefined.projectHelp: Actions available only in this project (added to the workspace-wide ones). Label is what users see; prompt is sent to the AI.

statuses.title: Statuses
statuses.confirmReset: Reset this status to its defaults?

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.confirmDelete: Delete {{ name }} and all their data? This cannot be undone.
tenants.demoConfigHint: Override the comment cap and demo period for this one demo tenant. Leave a field blank to use the global default.

settings.title: Settings
settings.signupEnabledDesc: When enabled, new admins can request access via the sign-up page.
settings.emailEnabledHint: Master switch for all outgoing email — demo credentials, signup approvals, and password resets. When off, Pointer sends no email at all; every send is skipped.
settings.emailFromHint: The sender address recipients see. It must be a sender or domain you have verified with your email provider (Brevo), otherwise messages are rejected or land in spam.
settings.emailFromNameHint: The display name shown next to the sender address, for example "Pointer".
settings.emailDailyCapHint: The maximum number of emails Pointer sends per day — a safety margin under your provider's free limit (Brevo allows 300/day, so keep this below it). Once reached, further sends are skipped until midnight UTC.
settings.emailApiKeyHint: The email provider API key is stored as a server secret and is never shown here. Set it in the server environment, not on this page.
settings.demoMaxActiveHint: The most demo workspaces that can be live at the same time across the whole site. Once this many are active, new demo requests are refused with a "try again shortly" message.
settings.demoTtlHoursHint: How long a new demo workspace stays active before it expires, in hours.
settings.demoPerEmailPerDayHint: How many demos a single email address may start in one day. Throttles abuse from repeated requests.
settings.demoCommentCapHint: The maximum number of comments allowed in a demo workspace, to keep demo data small. Can be overridden for an individual demo tenant from the Tenants page.

signup.title: Request Access
signup.pendingApproval: Your request has been submitted. A super-admin will review and approve your account.
signup.closed: Sign-up is currently closed. Please contact your administrator.

plan.marketingNote: Plan selection is informational. Billing integration coming soon.

suggestions.canEditDirectly: You can add this prompt directly.

invite.sectionHint: Generate a link that lets a teammate join this workspace with a chosen role. Invited teammates skip the approval queue.
invite.invalidLink: This invite link is missing its code.
invite.invalidOrExpired: This invite is invalid, expired, or already used.
